title: lippia durangensis
intro: Lippia durangensis, also known as 'Durango Lippia', is a plant species native to Mexico, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Lippia durangensis include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiseptic properties. In herbal preparations, Lippia durangensis is often used in infusions, teas, and tinctures to harness its medicinal benefits and support overall well-being.
